temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A woman with short brown hair is shown in profile, her expression focused and serious. She holds a small, clear glass jar containing a preserved human eye and a few strands of dark hair. She carefully pours a clear liquid from a white squeeze bottle into the jar, preserving the specimen. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a mysterious and clinical tone, introducing a character engaged in the preservation of a human eye, suggesting themes of death, memory, or scientific inquiry.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A faint, high-pitched, and slightly dissonant musical score begins, creating a sense of suspense and unease.)
(00:04-00:07) The scene abruptly cuts to a high-angle shot of a morgue. A medical examiner in a suit and tie stands over a gurney where a naked, deceased person lies. Two orderlies in scrubs are adjusting the body. In the background, another man in a white shirt and tie sits at a desk, observing the scene. (Storyline: This scene introduces the setting of a morgue and the medical examiner, connecting the previous shot of the eye preservation to a more clinical and somber context.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Neutral, slightly weary. 2) Background sounds or music: The suspenseful music continues from the previous scene.)
